caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with bold text that reads "I ON NEVER DO SHIT." The setting appears to be a studio or a room dedicated to recording, as evidenced by the professional microphone setup. The background is adorned with numerous framed photographs and memorabilia, suggesting a personal or themed space. There is also a mannequin dressed in casual clothing, indicating that the location might be part of a clothing store or a multifunctional space. The man seems engaged in conversation, possibly discussing topics related to business, entrepreneurship, or personal experiences.
